FaultPIDInformation.Note: Type in Bit definitions are: Reserved=Reserved for future use, Unused=Not reserved but currently not defined, NotUsed=Not used on current car line, Internal=Internal fult code, External=Not an internal fault code

ModuleTypes.Description: This is the node whose children is saved in initialization

Type11.Description: Driver and passenger bags/J1850 lamp drive

Type13.Description: Driver and passenger bags/hardwired lamp drive

VerifyVersionNumber.Description: Verify and Report software version number(s)

ReadAllFaultPIDs.Note: Do not run this in production. It is for testing only!
ReadAllFaultPIDs.Description: Read all detail fault PID locations
